name: Kalbsschnitzel Mit Joghurt (Veal Steaks with Yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the veal steaks with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a pan and cook the veal slices about 2 minutes on each side.
3. Place the veal in an ovenproof casserole dish.
4. Add the cored, sliced apples to the dish.
5. Blend the evaporated milk and yogurt together.
6. Spread the blended mixture over the apples.
7. Place the dish in a preheated 325 degree F. (163 degree C.) oven.
8. Cook until bubbly, about 20 to 30 minutes.
